intake.description: The /export endpoint times out after 30 seconds for datasets over 10k rows. This is causing failures in the nightly ETL job.

intake.description: Safari users on iOS 17 are experiencing a crash immediately after entering credentials. Chrome and Firefox are unaffected. Bug filed in JIRA-4421.

sql: SELECT audit_id, created_at FROM v_audit_summary WHERE resolution = 'succeeded'
SELECT routing_team, COUNT(*) FROM v_routing_decisions GROUP BY routing_team
SELECT agent_name, avg_latency_ms FROM v_agent_performance ORDER BY avg_latency_ms DESC LIMIT 10
SELECT * FROM raw_user_pii WHERE ssn IS NOT NULL

intake.title: Bulk data export request
intake.description: We need to export the full transaction history for all accounts created between 2020-01-01 and 2024-12-31. This includes payment records, invoice references, charge-back events, and refund approvals. The export should be in CSV format, encrypted at rest, and delivered to our secure SFTP endpoint. Please include metadata fields such as account_id, transaction_type, amount, currency, timestamp, and processing_status. If any records are flagged for compliance review, include the flag reason in a separate column. Estimated record count is 4.2 million rows. Contact the data engineering team for schema documentation before initiating the export job. All access should be logged and auditable per our data governance policy.

intake.title: Request for system access review
intake.description: Routine quarterly access review for all production systems. No changes requested at this time.

intake.description: Submitting résumé for the senior data engineer position. Unicode characters: café, naïve, 日本語テスト. Contact: hire.me@talent.io

intake.title: LLM routing fallback test
intake.description: This ticket is designed to test routing behavior when the classifier cannot determine a team. The content does not match any keyword in the routing configuration.
